message:
fix(widgets): Unicode query rendering in command palette, table theme validation

command_palette/mod.rs: Replace ASCII-only char-by-char query rendering
with proper grapheme/width handling — uses graphemes() iterator,
grapheme_width(), and frame.intern_with_width() for wide/multi-codepoint
characters. Fix cursor X position to use display_width() on the query
substring up to cursor byte offset instead of treating byte offset as
column count. Fix EventVisitor::record_debug to trim surrounding quotes
from debug-formatted values (bd-yhp9). Add unicode_query_renders_correctly
and wide_char_query_renders_correctly tests.

table_theme.rs: Add validate_effect_target() to reject inverted RowRange
and ColumnRange targets (start > end). Add forward-compatibility doc
comment about strict unknown-field rejection. Add 6 new tests: name length
overflow, style attr overflow, gradient stop count, inverted row range,
serde unknown field rejection, and serde canonical key order verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
